title: Interactive Sports Portrait AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 photoreal interactive football portrait built around adult East Asian football fan performer with bright expression, natural skin texture, and confident sideline interaction energy, crimson and ivory modernized guofeng football outfit with layered sleeves, athletic sash, embroidered football motifs, and light flowing scarf fabric, one hand gently tossing a small football toward the lens with playful near-camera perspective, and bright training-ground sideline with turf, sponsor boards, camera rail, soft stands, and festive crowd blur. Subject: adult East Asian football fan performer with bright expression, natural skin texture, and confident sideline interaction energy is the adult match-day portrait subject, wearing crimson and ivory modernized guofeng football outfit with layered sleeves, athletic sash, embroidered football motifs, and light flowing scarf fabric with half-up ponytail with tiny football charms, silver hair pins, and subtle stadium-themed accessories; the pose feels lively, playful, and directly engaged with the camera. Scene: bright training-ground sideline with turf, sponsor boards, camera rail, soft stands, and festive crowd blur provides the real football sideline environment with turf, ad boards, camera barrier, stands, and softly blurred fans. Composition: Fixed close smartphone perspective with a slight low-angle upward view: the subject leans toward the camera in a friendly interactive pose, one hand gently tossing a small football toward the lens with playful near-camera perspective, the football dominates the foreground, and the other hand controls the flowing scarf fabric to create strong perspective depth. Signature Elements: Football-bead hair tie, goalpost-inspired earrings, embroidered football and whistle details, near-camera football handoff, flowing scarf fabric, and real stadium sideline atmosphere. Style: High-definition realistic photography with playful World Cup sideline energy, modern guofeng fashion fusion, vivid lens participation, natural skin texture, and crisp smartphone immediacy. Color Palette: Fixed bright stadium greens, black-and-white football accents, clean skin tones, white fabric highlights, and vivid team-color clothing accents from crimson and ivory modernized guofeng football outfit with layered sleeves, athletic sash, embroidered football motifs, and light flowing scarf fabric. Lighting: Natural stadium daylight with clear facial structure, realistic fabric highlights, soft background separation, and a sharp foreground football focus. Camera: Close smartphone camera viewpoint, low angle with slight upward perspective, wide foreground ball distortion, shallow background blur, and immediate interactive framing. Materials: Football leather texture, embroidered fabric, flowing gauze scarf, metallic hair ornaments, bead accessories, grass, ad boards, and camera barrier details remain visible. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Interactive Sports Portrait Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 photoreal interactive football portrait built around adult Japanese football fan performer with refined features, lively eyes, natural makeup, and playful match-day energy, lake-blue and snow-white modernized guofeng football outfit with embroidered ball motifs, structured short jacket, flowing scarf fabric, and whistle details, one hand offering a small football toward the camera so the ball becomes the sharp foreground focus, and real stadium sideline interaction zone with grass, ad boards, photo barrier, stands, and distant fans. Subject: adult Japanese football fan performer with refined features, lively eyes, natural makeup, and playful match-day energy is the adult match-day portrait subject, wearing lake-blue and snow-white modernized guofeng football outfit with embroidered ball motifs, structured short jacket, flowing scarf fabric, and whistle details with side ponytail with football-bead hair tie, metallic goalpost ear clips, and small black-white feather details; the pose feels lively, playful, and directly engaged with the camera. Scene: real stadium sideline interaction zone with grass, ad boards, photo barrier, stands, and distant fans provides the real football sideline environment with turf, ad boards, camera barrier, stands, and softly blurred fans. Composition: Fixed close smartphone perspective with a slight low-angle upward view: the subject leans toward the camera in a friendly interactive pose, one hand offering a small football toward the camera so the ball becomes the sharp foreground focus, the football dominates the foreground, and the other hand controls the flowing scarf fabric to create strong perspective depth. Signature Elements: Football-bead hair tie, goalpost-inspired earrings, embroidered football and whistle details, near-camera football handoff, flowing scarf fabric, and real stadium sideline atmosphere. Style: High-definition realistic photography with playful World Cup sideline energy, modern guofeng fashion fusion, vivid lens participation, natural skin texture, and crisp smartphone immediacy. Color Palette: Fixed bright stadium greens, black-and-white football accents, clean skin tones, white fabric highlights, and vivid team-color clothing accents from lake-blue and snow-white modernized guofeng football outfit with embroidered ball motifs, structured short jacket, flowing scarf fabric, and whistle details. Lighting: Natural stadium daylight with clear facial structure, realistic fabric highlights, soft background separation, and a sharp foreground football focus. Camera: Close smartphone camera viewpoint, low angle with slight upward perspective, wide foreground ball distortion, shallow background blur, and immediate interactive framing. Materials: Football leather texture, embroidered fabric, flowing gauze scarf, metallic hair ornaments, bead accessories, grass, ad boards, and camera barrier details remain visible. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.
